title: Infinite Evolution - XLite Edition
description: This is the Extra Lite edition of the Infinite Evolution modpack.
body:
Infinite Evolution XLite (Extra Lite) is a **very lightweight** modpack for lower-end computers, but brings enjoyable gameplay. It is a version of Infinite Evolution Lite, and this version only has half the mods of Infinite Evolution - Lite. It is almost the same as vanilla Minecraft, but with a little bit of more things added.

It has mods like Create; Iron Chests; Ore Excavation.


<details>
<summary>List of all the mods</summary>

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin): Better hunger bar
- [Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on): For carrying things like chests
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create): For trains, etc.
- [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees): For a better look of trees
- ([FLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/flib): A library for mods)
- [Iron Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-chests): More chests, made of other materials
- [Iron Furnaces](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-furnaces): More furnaces, made of other materials
- [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap): Allows for waypoints, adds a map, and other map features
- [JEI (Just Enough Items)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei): Viewing recipes and items/blocks in the inventory
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks): Better inventory management, and some other additions for the mouse
- [Neat](https://modrinth.com/mod/neat): Adds a health bar, along with the mob's/player's name above the entity's head
- [Ore Excavation](https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-excavation): Adds the feature to mine blocks easier, quicker
- [Simple Storage Network](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-storage-network): Connect chests into a network

</details>


<details>
<summary>Additional Information</summary>

### Questions you may ask
Q: What's the goal in this modpack?

A: It's basically the same as vanilla Minecraft (beating the game), or your own goals. However in this modpack you can do many other things, like build a train network!

Q: I have an error, or the game is crashing! How do I fix this?

A: First, check the logs/crash logs, and see if it is one mod causing the error, or multiple mods. If it's multiple, it might be mods interfering. If it's one mod, it might only be an issue with that mod itself. Please first report the issue to that mod creator, and then to me if it's not the mod's issue.

### Contact Information
If you have questions or concerns, please report them to me on Discord. My username is "kimbalmusk_notbanicraft"

</details>
